Short CV

Dağlı, who completed her doctoral thesis in 2008, is the subject of "The Use of Metaphor in Television Commercials". Prof. Dağlı, who first started her academic career as a Research Assistant at Anadolu University, is currently the head of the Department of Advertising at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Communication. Dağlı's fields of study include advertising, copywriting, creative processes in advertising, neuromarketing, brand structuring process, the role of senses and experiences in consumer purchasing decisions.
